scripts.systemd-install: loginctl enable-linger $USER && mkdir -p ~/.config/systemd/user/ && cp multi-status-backend.service multi-status-backend.timer ~/.config/systemd/user/ && sed -i "s|REPLACEME_WORKDIR|$(pwd)|" ~/.config/systemd/user/multi-status-backend.service && systemctl --user daemon-reload && systemctl --user enable --now multi-status-backend.timer
scripts.systemd-uninstall: systemctl --user stop multi-status-backend.service && systemctl --user disable multi-status-backend.service && systemctl --user stop multi-status-backend.timer && systemctl --user disable multi-status-backend.timer && rm ~/.config/systemd/user/multi-status-backend.* && systemctl --user daemon-reload
